abstract: A promotional offer and message you provide in a real-time response to your Get Retention Message endpoint.
overview:
## Discussion

In your [doc://com.apple.retentionmessaging/documentation/RetentionMessaging/RealtimeResponseBody] real-time response, you can choose from mutually exclusive options. Include `promotionalOffer` in your response to provide a retention message with a promotional offer. The message identifier needs to refer to a message that doesn’t have an image, and that has a [doc://com.apple.retentionmessaging/documentation/RetentionMessaging/messageState] of `APPROVED`; otherwise, the retention message fails. For more information about setting up messages, see [doc://com.apple.retentionmessaging/documentation/RetentionMessaging/Upload-Message].

For new implementations, consider using the [doc://com.apple.retentionmessaging/documentation/RetentionMessaging/promotionalOfferSignatureV2] signature, which is easier to generate.

For more information on generating the signatures, see [doc://com.apple.retentionmessaging/documentation/RetentionMessaging/promotionalOfferSignatureV1] and [doc://com.apple.retentionmessaging/documentation/RetentionMessaging/promotionalOfferSignatureV2].

# promotionalOffer

**Object**

A promotional offer and message you provide in a real-time response to your Get Retention Message endpoint.

## Declaration

```swift
object promotionalOffer
```

## Discussion

In your [doc://com.apple.retentionmessaging/documentation/RetentionMessaging/RealtimeResponseBody] real-time response, you can choose from mutually exclusive options. Include `promotionalOffer` in your response to provide a retention message with a promotional offer. The message identifier needs to refer to a message that doesn’t have an image, and that has a [doc://com.apple.retentionmessaging/documentation/RetentionMessaging/messageState] of `APPROVED`; otherwise, the retention message fails. For more information about setting up messages, see [doc://com.apple.retentionmessaging/documentation/RetentionMessaging/Upload-Message].

For new implementations, consider using the [doc://com.apple.retentionmessaging/documentation/RetentionMessaging/promotionalOfferSignatureV2] signature, which is easier to generate.

For more information on generating the signatures, see [doc://com.apple.retentionmessaging/documentation/RetentionMessaging/promotionalOfferSignatureV1] and [doc://com.apple.retentionmessaging/documentation/RetentionMessaging/promotionalOfferSignatureV2].

## Real-time response body

- **message**: A message identifier you provide in a real-time response to your Get Retention Message endpoint.
- **alternateProduct**: A switch-plan message and product ID you provide in a real-time response to your Get Retention Message endpoint.
- **advancedCommerceInfo**: A response object you provide to present an offer or switch-plan recommendation message.
